creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 253966
devel/py-incremental: Update to 24.7.2

This should update devel/py-incremental to 24.7.2. The resulting port builds fine for me, appears to create a complete python package when compared with a version installed directly via pip and (perhaps most importantly) appears to works fine with recent py-twisted versions, which require a more recent version of py-incremental than the one currently in ports.

Feedback is welcome as always. :)
